specs.title: 1.1 — shows error banner for invalid credentials
1.2 — manager can log in and reach dashboard
1.3 — developer can log in and reach dashboard
1.4 — submit button is disabled while signing in
1.5 — empty email prevents form submission
1.6 — retry with correct credentials after failed attempt
1.7 — login page displays the brand logo
1.8 — password field has type="password"
1.10 — auth token is persisted after successful login @slow
[DB-01] dashboard heading and subtitle render
[DB-02] six KPI cards are present on the dashboard
[DB-03] — sprint selector contains all mock sprints
[DB-04] — developer selector shows all team members
[DB-05] — selecting a sprint shows per-developer chart
[DB-06] — developer detail table shows all developers
[DB-07] — KPI values reflect mocked API data
[DB-08] — full dashboard renders without network errors @slow
[AI-01] — AI Reports page heading is visible
[AI-02] — KPI cards reflect total and high-severity reports
[AI-03] — report cards display task title and developer name
[AI-04] — report cards display AI summary and recommendations
[AI-05] — empty reports state shows "Sin datos aún"
[AI-06] — negative: non-existent category badge does not appear

[TM-01] should load task manager page and display team members

[TM-05] should close create task modal when cancel button is clicked

[TM-06] should create task successfully (Training unassigned)
[TM-06] should create task successfully (Task with long estimate)
[TM-07] should update task status (Mark as completed)
[TM-07] should update task status (Mark as in progress)
[TM-07] should update task status (Move to in progress)
[TM-08] should display delete confirmation dialog
[TM-09] should send delete request after confirmation
